title: Update CI AWS role secret for publish-console-worker-image

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Applying workflow change to use AWS_GITHUB_ACTIONS_CONSOLE_WORKER_ROLE_ARN for publish-console-worker-image role-to-assume. Existing trigger-deployment job remains on AWS_GITHUB_ACTIONS_ROLE_ARN.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Completed workflow patch: .github/workflows/ci.yaml line 179 now uses secrets.AWS_GITHUB_ACTIONS_CONSOLE_WORKER_ROLE_ARN for publish-console-worker-image. trigger-deployment role-to-assume at line 295 remains secrets.AWS_GITHUB_ACTIONS_ROLE_ARN.
